description: Base platform tiers. Customers always subscribe to a core tier, then add modules or bundles on top. Aligns with TIER_MODULES in api/provision.js and V3_TIERS in app.html.

tiers.name: Starter OS
tiers.description: Shared workspace, CRM, templates, automation marketplace access, and two included starter modules.

tiers.name: Growth OS
tiers.description: Starter plus outcome dashboards, recommendation engine, and five included modules.

tiers.name: Scale OS
tiers.description: Growth plus advanced routing, multi-location support, premium support, and up to 12 included modules.

concierge_setup.description: Optional guided setup: imports, templates, staff training, and first-month activation review.
